summary: Emit corpus_metadata INSERTs last (schema_version, embedding_model, embedding_dim, corpus_version, exported_at, source_commit_sha); print summary; verify two consecutive exports of unchanged data are byte-identical gzips

resolution.note: corpus_metadata emitted last; 6 keys match v2 §6.4. Byte-determinism verified: two back-to-back exports produce identical SQL after stripping the three variable fields. Final artifact: 10.05 MB gzip, 2531 chunks, loads in a single transaction.
